name: 古月浮屿 V1 第一阶段完成判定门禁
principle: 阶段完成必须由证据决定，而不是由感觉决定。
reason: 世界骨架、协议、模块、性能和文档已基本成型；但真实 npm 构建、真实浏览器 QA、真实性能实测和预览部署尚未执行。

completionGates.evidence: npm run build in real project
npm run typecheck in real project
npm run lint in real project
Vercel/Cloudflare preview URL and route checks
content productization and seed quality gates

doneWhen: all external-required gates are executed and recorded
P0 defects are closed or explicitly deferred with reason
preview deployment has no critical public/private boundary issue
home/archive/node/path/status/skeleton routes pass visual and interaction QA
rules: 不得在未执行真实构建时宣称第一阶段完成。
不得在未做真实浏览器 QA 时关闭视觉/交互缺陷。
不得在未做真实性能实测时宣称性能达标。
完成判定必须写入阶段验收记录。
